title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Exposure presets list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Pinia holds dial stops, presets collection, active mode, and filters — shared across components
Implemented with Vue 3, Pinia, and Tailwind CSS; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist presets or dial state
Manages the presets collection only in component-local refs rather than Pinia
Full-viewport lab composition with overlaid dials and a dense presets list/panel remains tool-like
Empty presets state is visually present when the collection is empty
Replaces the lab with a marketing card grid and no live exposure preview
Required hover animations are present; dial/meter/preview and mode switches animate as specified
Mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover feedback on steppers or preset rows so controls feel static on pointer hover
